notification.subject: AgentFlow run complete: weekly pipeline report
notification.body: The weekly pipeline report finished. West region closed 12 deals totaling $2.2M. See the attached summary in the workspace.

hitl.subject: Approval needed: discount over 15%
hitl.body: A flow is paused awaiting your approval for a 20% discount on renewal ORD-10294. Reply in the portal to continue.
